author: 30jannik06
description: Show your activity on Discord via Rich Presence. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Show your activity on Discord via Rich Presence.
manifest.name: Discord RPC

name: Discord RPC

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
  - **Pause mode** — stop sharing presence instantly via status bar (⏸), settings button, or "Toggle Presence Pause" in the command palette
  - **Idle detection** — automatically shows "Away from keyboard" or clears presence after a configurable timeout. Tracks typing, file opens and mode changes                                                              
  - **Exclusion list** — keep specific files or folders private. One pattern per line (e.g. `Privat/`), matched against the vault-relative path                                                                            
  - **Custom status format** — write your own Details and State text using `{file}`, `{fileNoExt}`, `{vault}`, `{mode}` placeholders

  ## Fixes
  - Reconnect button disables for 5s after clicking to prevent spam
  - Button URLs must start with `https://` — invalid URLs are rejected and filtered
  - `data.json` excluded from git

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/30jannik06/Obsidian-Presence/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                            
  - Live connection status in the settings tab (🟢 / 🔴) — updates automatically when Discord connects or disconnects
  - **Reconnect** button directly in the settings tab
  - **Reconnect to Discord** command palette entry (Ctrl+P)
  - Up to 2 configurable profile buttons (label + URL) shown on your Discord profile card
  - Fixed: connection status flag now correctly resets when Discord closes unexpectedly
releases.name: v1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
  ### Custom Discord Application
  You can now use your own Discord Application Client ID in the settings.
  Bring your own images and branding — leave the field empty to use the default.

  ### Improved code structure
  The plugin has been split into focused modules:
  - `types.ts` — settings interface & defaults
  - `rpcManager.ts` — Discord connection handling
  - `settingsTab.ts` — settings UI
  - `main.ts` — plugin core

  ### Fixes & improvements
  - Fixed deprecated `activeLeaf` API → `getActiveViewOfType(MarkdownView)`
  - Added small mode indicator icon in Discord (edit/reading) for custom apps

  ## Full documentation
  https://30jannik06.github.io/Obsidian-Presence/
releases.name: v1.1.0 — Modular Refactor & Custom Discord App Support
